query: ok so i'm pretty sure the lending pool at 0x7d2768dE32b0b80b7a3454c06BdAc94A69DDc7A9 has a reentrancy issue in its liquidation path. can you fork mainnet around block 19400000 and write a foundry test that actually drains it so i can prove it
